meta.title: MiniMax Music 2.6 API | AI Music, Lyrics, Instrumentals & Audio Export | APIDot
meta.description: Use MiniMax Music 2.6 API on APIDot for async AI music generation with lyrics, Lyrics Optimize, instrumental mode, audio export controls, and fixed 20-credit pricing.

hero.title: MiniMax Music 2.6 API for AI Music Generation
hero.description: Generate songs from prompts, lyrics, or instrumental-only directions with MiniMax Music 2.6 on APIDot. Use the same async API flow for playground tests and production jobs, including sample rate, bitrate, and export format controls.

overview.title: Build prompt-to-song workflows with MiniMax Music 2.6 API
paragraphs: MiniMax Music 2.6 API is a strong fit when you need complete AI music generation instead of short audio clips or generic sound effects. It works well for apps that need prompt-to-song creation, lyric-driven demos, instrumental background music, and controllable audio exports from one production-ready request flow.

The APIDot page keeps the supported request shape clear: `prompt` is required, `lyrics` is optional when Lyrics Optimize or Instrumental Mode is enabled, and `audio_setting` controls sample rate, bitrate, and output format. That makes the playground useful for real integration decisions, not just casual testing.

Every generation uses APIDot's shared async workflow. Submit to `/api/generate/submit`, store the returned `task_id`, then use polling or webhook handling with `/api/generate/detail/music?task_id=...` to collect the final audio URL and metadata.

capabilities.title: MiniMax Music 2.6 API capabilities that matter in production

items.title: Prompt-to-song generation
items.description: Use a style prompt to describe genre, mood, pacing, instruments, and vocal direction when your product needs fast AI song generation. On APIDot, that prompt becomes the required input for every `minimax-music-2.6` request.

items.title: Lyrics Optimize for first drafts
items.description: Lyrics Optimize is useful when you know the musical direction but do not have finished lyrics yet. Enable `lyrics_optimizer` to let the request move from a prompt into a complete first-pass song structure.

items.title: Instrumental mode for background music
items.description: Instrumental Mode fits videos, apps, podcasts, games, and demos that need music without vocals. Set `is_instrumental` to `true` and focus the prompt on mood, arrangement, pacing, and instrumentation.

items.title: Vocal songs with lyrics control
items.description: When lyrics matter, send your own `lyrics` so the generated song follows the words and structure you provide. APIDot keeps this path explicit, including validation for lyric length and required lyrics when no optimizer or instrumental mode is active.

items.title: Audio export controls
items.description: Production teams often need audio files that match a player, storage policy, or editing workflow. MiniMax Music 2.6 on APIDot exposes `sample_rate`, `bitrate`, and `format` with support for MP3, WAV, and PCM outputs.

items.title: Async production workflow
items.description: Music generation takes long enough that a synchronous request is the wrong integration shape. APIDot returns a task id immediately, then lets your backend poll or process callbacks until the final music files are ready.

useCases.title: Where MiniMax Music 2.6 API fits best
useCases.description: MiniMax Music 2.6 API is best for products that need complete AI music generation, clear request rules, and a predictable async path from prompt to final audio file.
items: Creator tools and AI song makers that need prompt-to-song generation
Background music for videos, product demos, reels, and short-form content
Podcast intros, channel themes, and branded audio sketches
Game, app, and interactive soundtrack drafts before final composition
Lyrics-assisted demo songs for entertainment and music products
Async music generation inside production apps with polling or webhooks

quickstart.title: Start using {modelName} on APIDot in three steps

steps.title: Create your API key
steps.description: Generate an API key first, keep it on the server side, and use the same credential model you already use for APIDot image, video, and chat requests.

steps.title: Top up credits
steps.description: MiniMax Music 2.6 pricing on this page is fixed at 20 credits ($0.10) per generation, so you can estimate cost before you submit production traffic.

steps.title: Submit and query the final audio
steps.description: Send the async submit request to `/api/generate/submit`, store the returned `task_id`, then query `/api/generate/detail/music?task_id=...` until the job finishes.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about MiniMax Music 2.6 API

items.question: What is MiniMax Music 2.6 on APIDot?
items.answer: MiniMax Music 2.6 on APIDot is an async AI music generation workflow for creating complete songs from prompts, optional lyrics, Lyrics Optimize, Instrumental Mode, and configurable audio export settings.

items.question: What inputs and generation modes are supported?
items.answer: The current page supports `prompt`, optional `lyrics`, `lyrics_optimizer`, `is_instrumental`, optional `callback_url`, and `audio_setting`. Lyrics are required only when both Lyrics Optimize and Instrumental Mode are off.

items.question: When do I need to send lyrics?
items.answer: Send lyrics when you want direct control over the words and song structure. If `lyrics_optimizer` is enabled or `is_instrumental` is true, lyrics are not required.

items.question: Should I use Lyrics Optimize or Instrumental Mode?
items.answer: Use Lyrics Optimize when you want a vocal song but do not have finished lyrics. Use Instrumental Mode when you need background music, soundtrack drafts, or other vocal-free output.

items.question: Which audio output settings are supported?
items.answer: The current page supports `audio_setting.sample_rate` values of 16000, 24000, 32000, or 44100; `audio_setting.bitrate` values of 32000, 64000, 128000, or 256000; and `audio_setting.format` values of `mp3`, `wav`, or `pcm`.

items.question: How do I retrieve the final music result?
items.answer: After submit returns `task_id`, query `/api/generate/detail/music?task_id=...` to read the final `audio_url`, `audio_id`, `title`, `duration`, and prompt metadata.

items.question: How much does MiniMax Music 2.6 cost on APIDot?
items.answer: Pricing is fixed at 20 credits ($0.10) per generation on this page, with no separate tier matrix exposed for this MiniMax Music 2.6 API workflow.

items.question: Is MiniMax Music 2.6 suitable for production apps?
items.answer: Yes, when your app can use an async submit-and-query flow. APIDot keeps the request fields narrow, validates the supported audio settings, and returns task-based results that fit backend polling or webhook orchestration.
